challenge.title: Korak 3
challenge.description:
Nakon dobijanja vrednosti unosa, potrebno je da ga podelite u niz brojeva. Koristite metodu .split() za to.

Funkcija .split() prima niz znakova i deli ga na niz podstringova. Možete mu dati string ili regularni izraz (regex) koji će se koristiti kao separator. Na primer, string.split(",") deli taj niz svaki put kada postoji zarez i vraća niz podstringova.

Koristite standardnu funkciju /,\s*/g za razdvajanje niza znakova value pomoću zareza. Možete ga prilagoditi u zavisnosti od broja razmakoteka koje razdvajaju vaše vrednosti. Sačuvajte taj red u parametar array.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Vaša funkcija za calculate treba da ima parametar array.
Tvoja funkcija calculate treba da pozove metodu .split() na parametru value.
Vaša funkcija calculate treba da postavi vrednost rezultata metode .split() na parametar array.
Trebalo bi da koristiš /,\s*/g kao putanju za split().
